channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-27 05:56 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Probability of me getting a fair trial if this is how the judge dresses is 0.0%
item.description: Probability of me getting a fair trial if this is how the judge dresses is 0.0%

item.title: @elonmusk: When Elon mentioned visiting Saturn, it sounded like from a sci-fi movie. And, he is serious, "Now, ...
item.description: When Elon mentioned visiting Saturn, it sounded like from a sci-fi movie. And, he is serious, "Now, wouldn’t it be amazing if you could buy a trip to Saturn? Or frankly, if you just have a trip to Saturn. I think things will just be free in the future. It sounds nuts, but you know, if you’ve got an AI robotics economy that is anywhere close to a million times the size of the current Earth economy, literally any need you possibly want can be met. If you can think of it, you can have it".

item.title: @elonmusk: Tesla is hands down the most exciting company in the world. No other company makes me this excited a...
item.description: Tesla is hands down the most exciting company in the world. No other company makes me this excited about the future. It’s a once-in-a-generation company.

item.title: @elonmusk: Terrorists Give Up After Three Hours In TSA Linebuff.ly/asKsRui
item.description: Terrorists Give Up After Three Hours In TSA Linebuff.ly/asKsRui

item.title: @elonmusk: Obama’s spokesman: “It’s not enough to simply beat Trump. He must be destroyed thoroughly. His kind ...
item.description: Obama’s spokesman: “It’s not enough to simply beat Trump. He must be destroyed thoroughly. His kind must never rise again”. This is how you got Obama’s third term (laughingly known as the Biden presidency) with all its lawfare, censorship, attacks on private citizens And without accountability, it will happen again as nothing has changed

item.title: @elonmusk: It's going to be incredible. I'm so happy with it.
item.description: It's going to be incredible. I'm so happy with it.

item.title: @elonmusk: Incredible that it was only 66 years from the first controlled, powered flight to landing on the Moo...
item.description: Incredible that it was only 66 years from the first controlled, powered flight to landing on the Moon!
